data.title: Amazon offering fulfillment options for Shein, Shopify and Walmart sellers
data.description: Services are available for Walmart Marketplace and Shopify Fulfillment Network merchants, with Shein adding Amazon by year's end.

data.title: Edible takes its marketplace national
data.description: After piloting in Texas earlier this year, the site will now ship to all states where hemp-derived THC is legal—reaching more than 65% of the U.S. population.

data.title: FedEx ramps up Amazon deliveries as Q1 sales rise
data.description: The deepening relationship marks a notable turn for FedEx, which ended its air and ground delivery contracts with Amazon in 2019.

data.title: Google launches payments protocol for AI commerce, names dozens of partners
data.description: Google's new Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) already has support from Salesforce, Shopify, Etsy and others.

data.title: DSW offers same-day delivery through Uber Eats
data.description: The partnership puts a DSW storefront on the Uber Eats ecommerce platform. It also allows consumers to track the DSW orders they place through Uber Eats in real time.
